title: Dictyospermum keyense
intro: Dictyospermum keyense is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The health benefits of Dictyospermum keyense include its potential use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Dictyospermum keyense is used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions and decoctions, which are often consumed to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
